subject: refactor(debug): split DebugPill into pill chrome + tabs + styles
body:
Audit finding extension to #16 — DebugPill.jsx was 527 lines,
27 lines over the 500-line component soft-limit from CLAUDE.md
"Code Organization". The file held three concerns: the pill /
panel chrome (state, subscriptions, copy actions), the three
tab body components (Log / Environment / PWA Diagnostics), and
a ~140-line inline styles object with severity / source colour
maps.

Split into three files inside a new `debug/` subdirectory so
they stay grouped without polluting the top-level components/
listing:

  dashboard/js/components/DebugPill.jsx              — 200 lines
  dashboard/js/components/debug/debugStyles.js       — 180 lines
  dashboard/js/components/debug/DebugTabs.jsx        — 187 lines

debugStyles.js exports the `styles` object plus `SOURCE_COLORS`
and `SEVERITY_COLORS` lookup maps. Standalone JS module (no JSX)
because both consumers (DebugPill chrome + DebugTabs bodies)
need access. The hex-literal exception for the debug pill is
documented in CLAUDE.md "Frontend: Styles and Scripts" — these
files inherit that exception with an extended rationale block
in the file header explaining why DaisyUI semantic tokens can't
be used here.

DebugTabs.jsx exports `LogTab`, `EnvironmentTab`,
`PWADiagnosticsTab`, and the `runDiagnostics()` async helper.
Pure presentation + the live-probe code; the parent owns all
state and stale-run cancellation via a monotonic counter ref.
Brings `getBrowserName()` along with `runDiagnostics()` because
it's only called from there.

DebugPill.jsx (now 200 lines, well under the limit) is reduced
to: pill / panel chrome render, debug-entry subscription,
auto-scroll effect, diagnostics fetch effect, copy/clear
handlers, and the manual-copy textarea fallback. Imports the
three tab components by name and renders them via the existing
`activeTab === N` discriminator.

Build clean (562.30 kB → 562.43 kB, +0.13 kB module scaffolding).
60/60 tests pass.

Tags: refactor, debug, code-organization, audit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: vanilla-daisyui-cleanup
Semver: patch
title: split DebugPill into pill chrome + tabs + styles
